The '''''Sea Killer''''' was a [[B'zabuu-class transport|''B'zabuu''-class transport]] owned by [[Toba]]. After owning the [[Starship/Legends|craft]] for a month, Toba painted the stylized face of an [[Opee sea killer/Legends|opee sea killer]] on the transport's nose. Toba also installed a Getaway [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|concussion missile launcher]], removed from a [[YG-4400 light freighter]], which he used for emergency escapes.

{{Ship-stub}}
